data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The uproarious fun surrounding Hyakkiyako Cherry Blossom Festival as well as "Cherry Blossom Festival Commotion" at the Hyakkiyako Academy are back!

🗓️Period: 9/20 (Tue) – 9/27 (Tue) 2:00 AM (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101073
